nodes.name: Daily 6 AM ET
nodes.notes: Triggers every morning at 6:00 AM Eastern. Workflow timezone is set to America/New_York in Settings.

nodes.name: Fetch Disney Parks Blog RSS
nodes.notes: Pulls Disney Parks Blog RSS as raw text. URL is the new disneyparksblog.com host (the old disneyparks.disney.go.com URL 301s here and hangs without a UA). Browser-style User-Agent is required; the site silently drops requests with no UA instead of returning 403. Timeout 60s + 3 retries.

nodes.name: Fetch additional Disney sources
nodes.notes: Fetches 5 additional Disney news RSS feeds in parallel (WDWNT, AllEars, Disney Food Blog, Disney Tourist Blog, Inside the Magic). Failures per source are isolated — one slow blog can't break the run. Each source's raw RSS is truncated to 8KB before passing to Claude.

nodes.name: Fetch themeparks.wiki destinations
nodes.notes: Park-status secondary source for current closures/refurbs. UA + 60s timeout + retry as defence-in-depth.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: disney parks OR disneyland OR "walt disney world" OR "magic kingdom" OR epcot OR "hollywood studios" OR "animal kingdom"

nodes.name: YouTube — Search broad (48h)
nodes.notes: YouTube Data API v3 — broad Disney/parks search across the last 48h. Requires a Generic Query Auth credential named 'YouTube API Key' with name=key, value=<your YouTube API key>.

nodes.name: YouTube — Featured: PagingMrMorrow
nodes.notes: Featured creator @PagingMrMorrow (channelId UCscn2aSpMrS2U_mf7OF-UwQ). Pulls the 5 most recent uploads from the last 7 days. Most recent ALWAYS gets a slot in the daily Top 10.

nodes.name: YouTube — Featured: Wright Down Main Street
nodes.notes: Featured creator @wrightdownmainstreet (channelId UCCE7kTsZ1icykc8hazTRNjg). Pulls the 5 most recent uploads from the last 7 days. Most recent ALWAYS gets a slot in the daily Top 10.

nodes.name: Merge YouTube IDs
nodes.notes: Combines IDs from the broad search + 2 featured-channel searches. Tags featured-channel videos so the rank node can guarantee inclusion. Output: { ids: 'id1,id2,...', featuredMeta: { videoId: { channelHandle } } }.

nodes.name: YouTube — Get video stats
nodes.notes: Fetches snippet + statistics for the merged ID list (broad + featured). Reuses the same 'YouTube API Key' credential.

nodes.name: Rank Top 10 by views
nodes.notes: Featured-channel videos always get a reserved slot (most recent upload from each). Remaining slots filled by view count from the broad search. Final display order is by view count.

nodes.name: Build research context
nodes.notes: Bundles RSS + themeparks.wiki + the top-10 video ranking into a single object the LLM can read. Computes today's slug + display date in Eastern Time.

nodes.name: Compose with Claude
nodes.notes: Calls Claude (claude-sonnet-4-5) with the research context. Retries 3x with 30s backoff to ride out transient 429/500/529s. continueOnFail+neverError pass any non-2xx response through to the validate node, which detects failure and substitutes a 'No major updates today' fallback briefing — the workflow never hard-stops here. 120s timeout gives long-context calls room. Guardrails on the prompt forbid invented breaking news.

nodes.name: Validate + format JSON
nodes.notes: Parses the LLM output, validates the shape against lib/guideDaily.ts, attaches AI metadata, and produces the file payload for GitHub. Throws (stops the workflow) on any schema violation — skip a day rather than ship a broken post.

nodes.name: GitHub — Lookup existing SHA
nodes.notes: GETs existing file metadata so the SHA can be supplied when updating. 404 (file not yet on disk) is handled gracefully via Continue On Fail — that case is treated as a fresh create.

nodes.name: GitHub — Build commit body
nodes.notes: Constructs the GitHub PUT-contents body. Base64-encodes the file content here (Buffer is available in Code nodes; not in HTTP expressions). Includes sha when updating an existing file.

nodes.name: Commit to GitHub
nodes.notes: PUT to GitHub contents API. Body built upstream by 'GitHub — Build commit body'. Creates new file if no sha, updates existing if sha present (re-runs on the same day work cleanly).

nodes.name: Wait 90s for Cloudflare deploy
nodes.notes: Wait for Cloudflare Pages to rebuild. The /feed.xml endpoint refreshes automatically when the new daily JSON is committed; downstream RSS-to-Email service (Buttondown) polls the feed and emails subscribers. This wait is the terminal step of the n8n pipeline.

main.node: YouTube — Featured: Wright Down Main Street
